_comment: Project Introduction Deck template v1. Based on project_intro_deck.pptx design: Aptos Display / Aptos fonts, Blank layout with custom shapes, footer on every content slide, two-column scope slide, checkmark success slide, Gantt image from Excel.

meta.description: Project introduction / kickoff deck. 11 slides. Matches the {company} project_intro_deck.pptx design system.

slides.name: Title
slides.title: {project_name}
slides.subtitle: Project Introduction
slides.speaker_notes: Welcome and introduce the project. State the project name, sponsor, and today's date.

slides.name: Why This Project Matters
slides.title: Why This Project Matters
slides.speaker_notes: Explain the business problem this project solves and the value it delivers to the firm.

slides.name: Scope and Deliverables
slides.title: Scope and Deliverables
slides.descriptor: What is – and is not – included
slides.speaker_notes: Cover what is in scope and explicitly state what is not. Out of scope items prevent scope creep.

slides.name: What Success Looks Like
slides.title: What Success Looks Like
slides.speaker_notes: Walk through each acceptance criterion. Make clear who signs off on each one.

slides.name: Project Timeline
slides.title: Project Timeline
slides.speaker_notes: Walk through the timeline. Highlight the critical path, any parallel tracks, and at-risk tasks.

slides.name: Key Milestones
slides.title: Key Milestones
slides.speaker_notes: Highlight approval gates and hard deadlines. Call out any milestone already at risk.

slides.name: Workstreams and Task Summary
slides.title: Workstreams and Task Summary
slides.speaker_notes: Summarise the main work packages. Keep it high level — detail is in the Gantt.

slides.name: Roles and Responsibilities
slides.title: Roles and Responsibilities
slides.speaker_notes: Introduce the team. Call out single points of failure or resource risks.

slides.name: Key Risks and Mitigations
slides.title: Key Risks and Mitigations
slides.descriptor: Top risks and how they are managed
slides.speaker_notes: Cover the top risks. Focus on High severity items and who owns the mitigation.

slides.name: Open Decisions
slides.title: Open Decisions and Confirmations Needed

content_source.section: 20. Open questions before final Gantt chart

slides.speaker_notes: These decisions need owners assigned in the room. Do not leave without clear next steps.

slides.name: Recommended Next Steps
slides.title: Recommended Next Steps
slides.speaker_notes: Close with concrete actions and owners. Confirm who does what and by when before leaving.
